title: Player wheel section set selection
abstract: Gaming systems and method that provide a player wheel set selection feature including a displayed wheel having a plurality of displayed player selectable sections for a play of a game, and wherein the quantity of sections selectable by the player is at least one and less than all of the sections of the wheel.
claims: 1. A gaming system comprising: a housing comprising an openable access door; a security monitoring circuit within the housing and configured to monitor the access door; a power distribution component within by the housing; a plurality of mechanical input devices supported by the housing; a plurality of output devices comprising a display device supported by the housing and a speaker supported by the housing; a ticket printer supported by the housing and configured to print a ticket responsive to an activation of one of the input devices; a sound card within by the housing and operable with the speaker; a processor within the housing; and a trusted memory device within the housing and that stores a plurality of instructions, that when executed by the processor, cause the processor to, for a first event: cause a display, by the display device, of a wheel and selectable sections of the wheel, wherein the selectable sections are respectively associated with different amounts for the first event, and wherein a first plurality but not all of the selectable sections are displayed without displaying any of the amounts in association with the first plurality of the selectable sections; cause a display, by the display device, of a quantity of the selectable sections that can be selected by a player, the quantity being at least two; cause a display, by the display device, of an indication of each of the quantity of selectable sections selected by the player using one of the input devices; and thereafter: cause a display, by the display device, for each of the selectable sections selected by the player that is not displayed with any of the amounts, the amount associated with that selectable section on that selectable section; cause a display, by the display device, of the wheel spinning; cause a display, by the display device, of the wheel stopped after spinning and such that an indicator indicates a randomly determined one of the selected selectable sections; and cause a display, by the display device, of the amount associated with the indicated selected selectable section.
